prompt: A breathtaking 3D pop-out cinematic portrait poster featuring Zendaya as the central subject — radiating regal, cool-girl elegance with an effortless edge. Her signature long sleek hair flows dramatically, with luminous deep-toned skin catching the screen-glow light beautifully. Her makeup is editorial perfection — sculpted cheekbones, glossy lips, and graphic liner. She wears a head-to-toe chocolate-and-gold coordinated look — a structured cropped corset top, fluid wide-leg satin trousers in deep caramel, strappy heeled mules, stacked chunky gold chain necklaces, and oversized hoop earrings that catch the light cinematically. She is depicted sitting inside the screen of a massive oversized smartphone, framed within an original fictional social media profile interface — styled after the visual language of Instagram but entirely original — featuring the handle @zendaya, a circular profile avatar, a follower count reading 287.4M, pinned post carousels, and clean minimalist UI buttons glowing in soft lavender-white screen light. Through extreme forced perspective and a dramatic wide-angle composition, she breaks through the phone screen entirely: one hand — adorned with stacked gold rings — thrusts forward directly into the camera lens with effortless confidence, while her long legs and strappy heels extend past the phone's lower frame, shattering the boundary between screen and reality. The depth illusion is maximal — hyper-cinematic, Vogue-cover bold. The background is a lavishly decorated luxury bedroom — walls layered in framed editorial photos, Polaroid collages, and neon-backlit art prints, all featuring the subject across her career. Floating freely through the space: iridescent champagne-gold and deep plum balloons, cascading rhinestone crystal shards catching warm light, shattered transparent glass fragments suspended mid-air, and ultra-fine gold glitter particles drifting in slow motion. Room palette: deep mauve-champagne with antique gold metallic accents. Lighting: Hollywood glamour three-point setup — cool blue-white key light from the phone screen, warm amber fill from practical room fixtures, razor-sharp golden rim light sculpting her silhouette. Anamorphic lens flares streak at the screen break-point. Fine bokeh gold particles shimmer in the background depth field. Rendering style: Ultra-photorealistic editorial photography meets hyperreal CGI compositing. ARRI Alexa 65, Panavision anamorphic, color graded with a rich warm-toned LUT, halation on highlight edges, Vogue-standard retouching. Aspect ratio 2:3 portrait. Mood: Untouchable celebrity royalty — stepping out of the internet, unhurried, magnetic.
